DeletePrepayInstance.relatedReleaseFlag: Whether to release the EIP and data disks attached to the instance at the time of deletion. Default: false (no associated release). Note: prepaid CDS disks associated with the instance will be forcibly released along with the instance.
DeletePrepayInstance.deleteCdsSnapshotFlag: Whether to release cloud disk snapshots. Default: false (no associated release).
DeletePrepayInstance.deleteRelatedEnisFlag: Whether to delete associated ENIs when the instance is released. Default: false (no associated release).
